headline: The Top 5 Analyst Questions From International Flavors & Fragrances’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: International Flavors & Fragrances’ first quarter results were met with a strong positive market reaction, as management credited broad-based volume growth across all business units and disciplined execution on productivity initiatives. CEO Erik Fyrwald highlighted that the company’s Health & Biosciences segment led with mid-single-digit sales growth, while Taste, Food Ingredients, and Scent also posted gains, supported by improved operational focus and a simplified portfolio. CFO Michael DeVeau
